title: NRO taps EarthDaily, Iceye, Pixxel to expand commercial data pipeline
description: The agency established a three-tier cybersecurity classification system for commercial data vendors

title: Pixxel pushes into orbital data centers for faster geospatial intelligence
description: Indian hyperspectral imaging startup Pixxel plans to test orbital data center technology on a pathfinder satellite designed to deliver geospatial intelligence directly from space.

title: IonQ to offer ground-movement monitoring via Capella radar satellites
description: Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar, or InSAR, enables automated detection of surface changes

title: Starcloud seeks more orbital data center funding shortly after unicorn status
description: Starcloud is looking to raise at least $200 million in a deal that would double the two-year-old orbital data center startup’s valuation to about $2.2 billion, a source close to the situation confirmed.

title: Pentagon freezes out Anthropic as it signs deals with AI rivals
description: The Department of Defense announced on Friday that it had struck deals with seven leading artificial intelligence companies.
